query:
UPDATE host_listings SET 
overseasExperience = 'I lived in the U.S. for over a decade, which deepened my appreciation for authentic Chinese cooking and gave me a unique perspective on cultural exchange through food.',
funFacts = 'Born in Guizhou, I rediscovered my love for Chinese cooking while living abroad. After two years back in China, I''m excited to share the flavors that brought me home.',
whyHost = 'Cooking became my love language when I was homesick abroad. Now I want to open my kitchen to travelers and share thoughtfully prepared meals, good conversation, and genuine cultural exchange.',
culturalPassions = 'I''m passionate about authentic Chinese regional cuisines, especially the dishes that connect us to our roots and tell our personal stories.'
WHERE id = 90002;
command:
